message:
🌱 Add consul: Transparent proxy dialed directly not working on Consul mission (#1277)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "consul-15470-transparent-proxy-dialed-directly-not-working-on-consul-1-14-0-and-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "consul: Transparent proxy dialed directly not working on Consul 1.14.0 and Consul K8s 1.0 ",
+    "description": "Transparent proxy dialed directly not working on Consul 1.14.0 and Consul K8s 1.0 . This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify consul troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your consul deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul -n consul --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review consul configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant consul configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
kubectl get configmap -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=consul
```
### Community Note

* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Transparent proxy dialed directly not working on Consul…",
+        "description": "Hi  Thanks for the heads up! We'll need to investigate what's going on here but on the face of it this will need to be addressed in our Core code. Let met transfer the issue there an we'll follow up to see if we need to a patch release to address.
```yaml
global:
  enableConsulNamespaces: false
  name: consul
  datacenter: dc
  logLevel: "error"
  logJSON: true
  metrics:
    enabled: true
    enableAgentMetrics: true
  tls:
    enabled: true
    enableAutoEncrypt: true
    verify: true
    httpsOnly: false
    serverAdditionalDNSSANs:
      ## Add the K8s domain name to the consul server certificate
      - "consul-k8s-service-url"
  ## For production turn on ACLs and gossipEncryption:
  # acls:
  #   manageSystemACLs: true
  # gossipEncryption:
  #   secretName: "consul-gossip-encryption-key"
  #   secretKey: "key"

server:
  replicas: 3
  re
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Transparent proxy dialed directly not working on… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul -n consul --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n consul --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi  Thanks for the heads up! We'll need to investigate what's going on here but on the face of it this will need to be addressed in our Core code. Let met transfer the issue there an we'll follow up to see if we need to a patch release to address.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "global:
  enableConsulNamespaces: false
  name: consul
  datacenter: dc
  logLevel: "error"
  logJSON: true
  metrics:
    enabled: true
    enableAgentMetrics: true
  tls:
    enabled: true
    enableAutoEncrypt: true
    verify: true
    httpsOnly: false
    serverAdditionalDNSSANs:
      ## Add the K8s domain name to the consul server certificate
      - "consul-k8s-service-url"
  ## For production turn on ACLs and gossipEncryption:
  # acls:
  #   manageSystemACLs: true
  # gossipEncryption:
  #   secretName: "consul-gossip-encryption-key"
  #   secretKey: "key"

server:
  replicas: 3
  resources:
    requests:
      memory: "1Gi"
      cpu: "500m"
    limits:
      memory: "1Gi"
      cpu: "500m"
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: false
    runAsUser: 0
  extraConfig: |
    {
      ",
+        "apiVersion: consul.hashicorp.com/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceDefaults
metadata:
  labels:
    app: apps-nginx
  name: apps-nginx
  namespace: apps
spec:
  transparentProxy:
    dialedDirectly: true"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
